query: SELECT a.id, a.status, a.contactRevealed, u.name as worker_name FROM applications a JOIN users u ON u.id = a.workerId WHERE a.status = 'offered' LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4ShrASiucEBBHq4.29f4086d1d74 --database REsBLBseSeXTZwj6TLp8WJ --execute SELECT a.id, a.status, a.contactRevealed, u.name as worker_name FROM applications a JOIN users u ON u.id = a.workerId WHERE a.status = 'offered' LIMIT 20;
